description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden chest of drawers with a rich, dark reddish-brown finish, likely made from stained hardwood such as cherry or mahogany. The front features six spacious drawers arranged in two rows of three, each equipped with sleek, curved metal bar pull handles, and two smaller upper drawers with round knob handles. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and back are plain, with the same wood grain texture and color, and the legs are short and slightly tapered, providing stable support. The overall design is simple and functional, with a modern yet classic aesthetic that would fit well in urban interiors, such as apartments, offices, or lobbies. No visible decorative carvings or embellishments are present, emphasizing a clean and practical look.
description: A large, dark reddish-brown wooden chest of drawers with six spacious drawers and sleek metal handles, featuring a flat top and simple, modern design.
description_view_0: The front view shows six drawers with metal handles and two smaller drawers with round knobs, highlighting the main interactive features.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, flat wooden panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a featureless wooden panel, matching the color and grain of the rest of the chest.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wooden panel with no interactive elements.
